[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10110000 3
1 00010000 1
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 00000000 a
5 00000000 a
6 00000000 a
7 00000000 a
